creator: jrh29@alumni.cwru.edu
text:
kldload snd_ai2s kernel panics with a kernel DSI read trap @ 0xdeadc0de by powerpc_config_intr+0x50

The stack trace (hand copied):
powerpc_config_intr+0x2c
aoagpio_attach+0xa8

Beyond this is standard device register framework.

How-To-Repeat: kldload snd_ai2s on a G4 (Tested PowerBook G4/1GHz and MDD)
